# 404DAMNED

## About
404DAMNED is a digital agency based in Amsterdam focused on high-performance web development, creative web design, and AI-driven digital experiences. We build modern websites, eCommerce platforms, and custom digital products using Next.js, React, WordPress, and headless architecture.

## What we do
- High-end website design & development
- Next.js & React applications
- WordPress & WooCommerce development
- eCommerce performance optimization
- AI-integrated web experiences
- UI/UX design systems
- Conversion-focused landing pages

## Who we serve
- Startups
- eCommerce brands
- SaaS companies
- Creative agencies
- Businesses looking for premium digital presence

## Core expertise
Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, WordPress, WooCommerce, REST APIs, headless CMS, performance optimization, SEO, AI integration

## Key differentiator
We combine design, performance engineering, and AI workflows to build websites that are not only visually strong but also optimized for conversion and automation.

- https://www.404damned.com/projects
- https://www.404damned.com/contact
